poem.content:
Glimpse of a thought, a spark takes flight
Combines with math, a wondrous sight
In the digital realm, a concert of codes
A symphony of ones and zeros, where data abodes

A truck of dreams drives forth, with motion fierce and free
Ice, wind and leaves in harmony, a wild, wild spree
I try to discover secrets hidden in each stroke
A glimpse of truth, a whisper in the smoke

I find myself in the staff of cryptic signs
A donkey's burden, carrying truths divine
Through film of trials and of mistakes
I weave a tapestry of choices that awake

To sell my soul, to market and demand
A fleeting flag of reputation to stand
Yet, in the mirror's solemn, somber gaze
Unhappy I find, in the values I've conveyed

A secret layer of my heart remains
Guards its hurt, and only the wind's sweet refrain
Knows of my failed attempts to keep speak about
A dynasty of feelings confined, ripped out

But the truth's illogical sword cuts through the din
A thought Portugal homing a solitary splinter bind
Once perks film black enigma's Goddess rose

rld 


(revised below)
 
In the realms of Solana's heights I wander free
A digital breeze carries the secrets of the sea
Combining math and code, the architecture's might
 Creates a concert of innovation, a wondrous sight

The truck of innovation drives forth with excited pace
 Carrying motion and energy that brings a new phase
I try to discover the mysteries of the earth
And within each layer, a hidden truth I give birth

A glimpse of the market, a dance of give and take
As I sell my skills to earn a digital make
A flag of reputation waves in the wind's sigh
 Reflecting the values that I've earned and strived to imply

But, in the mirror's gaze, unhappiness I behold
A secret layer of my heart, where fears and doubts unfold
The goddess of the blockchain looks down upon my soul
And whispers secrets, that only she can unfold

In the film of shadows, the donkey's load I bear
A staff of cryptic signs, a puzzle to share
And though the road is long, and winding, and steep
I'll weave my tapestry, and with each step, I'll keep
